base_checkpoint_selection: highest unweighted manifest-v3 validation macro-F1 across the frozen five-epoch linear-probe schedule
calibration: equal-source weighting across the three added field validation sources, with minimum temperature 1.5

fixed_thresholds.selection_source: hierarchical_validation_only_v9_candidate.json; thresholds carry forward the preexisting hierarchical_contract_v5.json policy

expected_crop_source_in_product: trusted crop-cycle metadata supplied by the API request
test_disclosure: The immutable test was observed for earlier ViT-Tiny candidates. This contract carries forward an already frozen crop-mismatch policy and records only manifest-v3 validation measurements from the DINOv2 linear probe. No DINOv2 frozen-test example, label, logit, calibration value, or per-example failure was inspected before this file was frozen.
